results.original_title: ウルトラヒーローズEXPO 2021 ニューイヤーフェスティバル IN 東京ドームシティ
results.overview: The Tokyo Dome City Prism Hall live Battle Stage for New Year 2021, starring Ultraman Z with daily appearances by the TV cast—culminates in a Grand Finale performance captured for home video.
results.title: Ultra Heroes EXPO 2021 New Year Festival

results.original_title: ウルトラヒーローズEXPO 2021 サマーフェスティバル IN 池袋・サンシャインシティ
results.overview: Filmed “battle stage” from the 2021 Ikebukuro summer exhibition: Ultraman Trigger teams with Tiga and New Generation heroes to thwart Absolute Tartarus and other foes across two story stages designed for the live arena audience.
results.title: Ultra Heroes EXPO 2021 Summer Festival
